topics.title: Synthesis of Polymers: Polymethyl methacrylate, Polyacrylamide, Regenerated Cellulose, Phenol-Formaldehyde Resin (Novolac and Resol), Polystyrene, Polyurethanes, Glyptal resins, Urea-Formaldehyde, and Melamine Formaldehyde
Quantitative Estimation of Monomers: Aniline, Phenol, Acetone, Ethyl Acetate, Formaldehyde, Acrylonitrile, Urea, Glycol, and Methyl methacrylate
Determination of Molecular Weight by Viscosity Method and End Group Analysis
Estimation of Polymers: Acrylonitrile content of NBR, Chlorine content of CR, and Rubber hydrocarbon content of NR
Analysis of Polymer Compounds: Iodine value, Carbon black content, Free sulphur content, Total inorganic content, and Silica content
Identification of Rubbers: NR, EPDM, Hypalon, Thiokol, and Silicone
Identification of Plastics: PE and Polyester
Identification of Thermoplastic Elastomers: SIS, SEBS, and Hytrel
